file_changes: style(qrcode): remove brand logo overlay and overhaul cinema mode to fullscreen edge-to-edge

- Removed the white pill-shaped brand logo overlay from the center of the QR code in both features.js and ui.js. Removed corresponding css styles in layout.css to align with premium glassmorphism aesthetics.
- Redesigned cinema mode in layout.css to occupy full viewport (width: 100vw, height: 100vh, padding: 0) instead of a centered card.
- Scaled up the QR canvas wrapper in cinema mode to fill 82% of the viewport (82vmin) cleanly.
- Added crisp image-rendering styles (pixelated and crisp-edges) to prevent pixel blur at large scales.
- Hidden the text label under the QR code during cinema mode to keep the display clean.
- Repositioned and resized the close and fullscreen toggle buttons in cinema mode to be larger and placed at the upper corners.
- Updated conductor track plan.md and metadata.json to reflect status completed.
